content_body:
In addition to having the best slice of Authentic New York Style pizza south of the Mason-Dixon line, La Pizzeria offers community experiences like shuffleboard leagues, bocce tournaments, and dart nights. They love to give back to the community with these events and host charitable groups whenever possible. 

Their pies are classic New York – crisp throwback crusts crowned with subtly sweet marinara and shredded mozzarella.
title: La Pizzeria
